title: UFC
html:
Stub. Mixed-martial-arts league. Recurs across Yahir's writing as a betting-content target (WagerWrld memo specs UFC head-to-head wagers; the 2023 year recap notes Paige getting kissed at "UFC night") and as a cultural-masculinity touchstone in the McGregor / fellas vocabulary.
